name: Grand MALL Simulator
short_description: Welcome to Grand Mall Simulator — Take control of a shopping mall and turn it into the city’s top shopping hotspot! Grand Mall Simulator is a multi-store management game where you hire staff, decorate storefronts, and earn money by completing tasks and expanding your business beyond the mall!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Grand Mall Simulator — an engaging economic simulator where you take on the role of managing your very own shopping mall.

Start with a small store and gradually turn it into a true retail giant. Choose your product range, set prices, monitor customer satisfaction, and strike a balance between profit and reputation: overpriced goods can bring in more income but may drive customers away.

Hire staff to automate routine tasks and create a pleasant atmosphere for visitors. Decorate your stores with stylish interiors, improve their appeal, and attract more customers. When money runs low, take on temporary side jobs like cleaning the streets or helping nearby shops for a quick boost.

Invest wisely: take out loans, open bank deposits, and once your mall becomes successful, expand beyond its walls — open outdoor stores and generate passive income.

Don’t forget to have fun: try your luck in the lottery, search for hidden items, and unlock unique achievements.

Game Features:

- Business growth and full shopping mall management

- Price control and customizable product selection

- Flexible decorating system for interiors

- Side jobs for extra earnings

- Investment opportunities and passive income

- Day-night cycle affecting gameplay

- Easter eggs, secrets, and achievements for the most attentive players

Can you turn a humble little shop into a legendary shopping destination that draws crowds from across the city?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Turkish
